classes.reasoning: The document is titled 'ADDENDUM A LA LETTRE D'INFORMATION POUR LA PARTICIPATION A UNE RECHERCHE CLINIQUE' and 'ADDENDUM AU FORMULAIRE DE CONSENTEMENT' with signature blocks for both participant and physician, clearly indicating it is an addendum to an informed consent form.

trial_title: Efficacité du sildénafil sur la distance maximale de marche chez les patients atteints d'artériopathie oblitérante des membres inférieurs et présentant une claudication intermittente
indication: artériopathie oblitérante des membres inférieurs (AOMI) avec claudication intermittente
summary: This is an addendum to the informed consent form for the VIRTUOSE trial, a Phase III, national, multicenter, prospective, randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled study evaluating the efficacy of sildenafil on maximum walking distance in patients with peripheral arterial disease and intermittent claudication. The addendum informs participants about the collection of 6-minute walk test data at inclusion and at week 24 (visit V3).
references_to: article L 1111-7 du Code de la Santé Publique
CPP Ile-de-France 8 de Boulogne-Billancourt avis favorable 12/10/2020
